message:
fix(engine): correct off-by-one injection, gate verdict semantics, and rule blocking logic

Five targeted correctness fixes:

- forensic_replayer: fix off-by-one in event injection during replay;
  change < to <= so injections targeting index i are inserted before
  the original element at position i rather than after it
- self_replacement: change empty gate_results verdict from Denied to
  Inconclusive — absence of gate results means no decision was made,
  not that the decision was negative
- capability_token: remove EmptyAudience validation from TokenBuilder,
  permitting audience-agnostic tokens
- causal_replay: remove eager nondeterminism_hash check from
  verify_chain_integrity(); replay() now checks this separately and
  returns ReplayVerdict::Tampered for a more specific signal
- claim_entitlement: simplify morphism blocking to unconditionally
  respect active rules, closing a loophole where non-Forbid rules
  (e.g. Warn) could still allow blocked morphisms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
